//: Map of Windows Forms sources to their Avalonia twins. One entry per ported source file.
status: scaffolded (compiles, layout unfinished) | functional (works, reduced feature set) | parity (feature-complete twin).
basedOn: the upstream commit the twin was last synchronized with.
eng/avalonia/upstream-drift.sh joins upstream diffs against this map; keep it accurate when porting or syncing.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormBrowse.notes: Reduced shell: five browse panes plus Repository/Refresh, Commands/Commit/Checkout branch/Create branch/Pull-Fetch/Fetch all/Merge branches/Rebase/Manage stashes, and Tools/Git bash external-terminal launch. Browse hotkeys dispatch the implemented commands with upstream IDs; F5 refresh uses Avalonia-only command ID 50 because WinForms routes it through ToolStrip shortcut handling. Remaining menus and toolbars are added with their dialogs.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormChecko.notes: Local branches only; remote-branch create/reset flow not ported. Auto-stash works; the "apply stashed items again?" prompt is the upstream task dialog with its "don't show again" box, over the Compat TaskDialog surrogate.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormMergeB.notes: Branch/tag/remote selection (including multiple heads), fast-forward/no-ff/no-commit/squash/unrelated-history/strategy/log/custom-message options, persisted settings, real process execution, conflict handling, help images, Browse menu, and Ctrl+M hotkey. Before/after merge ScriptsEngine events remain deferred to Phase 3.23.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormRebase.notes: Plain rebase supports heads/remotes/tags, immediate and advanced-option entry points, preserve-merges/auto-stash/date/update-refs/specific-range options, real process execution, repository notification, Browse menu, and Ctrl+Shift+E. The in-progress controller supports continue, skip, abort, conflict resolution, and commit. Interactive/autosquash, PatchGrid visualization, add-files, edit-todo, and the commit-picker button remain deferred to Phase 3.6b.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormStash..notes: Manage/create mode, worktree/index and stored-stash file lists, real diff preview, stash all/selected, apply/drop, persisted options, repository refresh binding, continuous file scrolling, and Ctrl+N/Ctrl+P/F5 hotkeys. The drop confirmation uses the Compat TaskDialog surrogate. FileViewer line patching and FileStatusList context-menu actions remain deferred.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormResolv.notes: Ported at the post-97cfa7b44 shape (FormBusyScope keeps the UI thread free while the merge tool runs). The conflicted-files grid is a multi-select ListBox showing file names (the hidden Author column had no data source upstream); the SortableBindingList header-sort and the go-to-manual link are dropped. Solve-conflict choices (keep local/remote/base, apply-to-all) use the Compat TaskDialog surrogate. SaveFileDialog becomes the Avalonia storage provider; "open with"/"show in folder" fall back to the default application/folder outside Windows. Context-menu Ctrl+1..3 shortcuts are dispatched in OnKeyDown. Deferred with TODOs: custom merge tools (CustomDiffMergeToolProvider), FormMergeSubmodule (a message box explains until then; new string recorded in AGENTS §9), and the hidden file-history item.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/MergeConfl.notes: Verbatim; the middle-of-patch and middle-of-rebase follow-ups reach dialog members that still throw NotImplementedException.

src/app/GitUI/FormBusyScope.cs.notes: Introduced upstream by 97cfa7b44. Avalonia windows have no IsDisposed; re-enabling unconditionally is safe.

src/app/GitUI/WaitCursorScope.cs.notes: WinForms swaps one global Cursor.Current; the twin swaps the cursor of every open window and restores on dispose, nesting like the original.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormCreate.notes: Creates and optionally checks out normal or orphan branches. Commit selection accepts a revision/SHA as text; the chooser button is hidden until FormChooseCommit is ported. Submodule update after checkout is deferred.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormCommit.notes: Normal whole-file commits are functional: staged/unstaged lists, diff preview, stage/unstage selected/all, message editing, shared CommitMessageManager, FormProcess execution, browse entry point, and commit-and-push. Amend/fixup/squash, templates/history, advanced validation, scripts/hooks UI, and signing/author options remain deferred.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormPush.c.notes: Reduced flow: current branch to the same branch on the selected remote, optional force-with-lease, push-on-show, and commit-and-push. URL/tag/multiple-branch pushes, tracking prompts, remote management, scripts, submodule options, and rejected-push recovery remain deferred.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormPull.c.notes: Reduced flow: merge pull, rebase pull, and fetch-only from a selected configured remote; immediate execution and the browse entry point are functional. URL pulls, remote management, auto-stash, tag/prune/unshallow controls, scripts, submodule follow-up, and conflict recovery remain deferred.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/RevisionGrid/.notes: Read-only graph/ref labels/selection plus the first context-menu actions: checkout a local branch containing the selected commit and create a branch at it. Remaining menu items, column providers, and hotkeys are deferred.
Covered by golden-image tests in GitUI.Avalonia.Tests.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/FileStatusLis.notes: List with change-kind markers, exposed statuses, configurable multi-selection, revision-aware FileStatusItem entries, worktree/index grouping, repository refresh binding, selection navigation, and WinForms-shaped selection/double-click events. Filtering, staging interactions, and context menus remain deferred.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/BranchComboBo.notes: Editable branch/ref selector with typed display template, selected-text API, validation, and the multi-branch selection dialog. Avalonia's editable ComboBox supplies completion behavior instead of WinForms Suggest mode.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/HelpImageDisp.notes: Reusable expandable/collapsible help image, persisted expansion state, hover image swap, and original translation keys. Dynamic top-level resizing is unnecessary because Avalonia layout reflows the host.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/FileViewer.cs.notes: Read-only unified diff on AvaloniaEdit, including revision-aware Git diff loading, Escape handling, and top/bottom continuous-scroll events. No margins, encodings menu, blob/blame/range modes, or line patching yet.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormSelectMu.notes: Multi-select ListBox equivalent of the checked branch list; preserves SelectBranch and GetSelectedBranches.

src/app/GitUI/Resources/Help/HelpCommand.notes: Linked as an AvaloniaResource; the tracked PNG is shared unchanged.
Linked as an AvaloniaResource; the tracked PNG is shared unchanged.
Linked as an AvaloniaResource; the tracked PNG is shared unchanged.

src/app/GitUI/CommitInfo/CommitInfo.cs.notes: Simplified header + message; no links, avatars, or branch/tag expansion yet.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/CommitPickerS.notes: Text entry resolves a revision name or SHA. FormChooseCommit and the commit-count hint are deferred.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/CommitSummary.notes: Compact author/date/message/branches/tags summary; WinForms-specific color adaptation and resize code are unnecessary in the Avalonia layout.

src/app/GitUI/LeftPanel/RepoObjectsTree..notes: Flat Branches/Remotes/Tags lists; no nested folders, stashes, or submodules yet.

src/app/ResourceManager/GitExtensionsFor.notes: Translation uses the one-pass Avalonia adapter while retaining shared XLF keys; window hotkeys use persisted shim Keys through KeysMapper and ExecuteCommand(int), with shared Escape-to-close for dialogs.

src/app/ResourceManager/TranslatedContro.notes: Translation uses the one-pass Avalonia adapter while retaining shared XLF keys.

src/app/GitExtUtils/GitUI/DpiUtil.cs.notes: Identity twin: Avalonia layout units are DIP, scale is always 1.

src/app/GitUI/GitModuleForm.cs.notes: UICommands/Module plus the shared IGitUICommandsSource contract and hotkey service discovery; scripts remain deferred.

src/app/GitUI/GitModuleControl.cs.notes: Command-source discovery and Module/UICommands access only; disposal and script-command plumbing arrive with their consumers.

src/app/GitUI/IGitUICommandsSource.cs.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/GitUICommandsSourceEventAr.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/Hotkey/HotkeySettings.cs.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/Hotkey/HotkeySettingsManag.notes: Reduced loader preserves the upstream XML format and command IDs for the implemented FormBrowse and FormResolveConflicts commands. Settings editing, scripts, and other hotkey targets join as their consumers are ported.

src/app/GitUI/GitExtensionsDialog.cs.notes: MainPanel/ControlsPanel chrome is declared per-dialog in axaml, not inherited.

src/app/GitUI/GitUICommands.cs.notes: Process, normal-commit, push, pull/fetch, local-checkout, create-branch, reset-changes, stash (save/staged/pop/drop/apply with conflict follow-up), resolve-conflicts, and submodule-update members are real; unported members throw NotImplementedException.

src/app/GitUI/ServiceContainerRegistry.c.notes: Registers the plain text console emulation, reduced hotkey settings loader, and cross-platform external-terminal launcher; Linux honors the desktop default through xdg-terminal-exec before named fallbacks.

src/app/GitUI/MessageBoxes.cs.notes: Reduced twin forwards generic overloads to the shared approved wrapper and ports the translated helpers in use: FailedToRunShell, Confirm, ConfirmResolveMergeConflicts, MiddleOfRebase, MiddleOfPatchApply, and ConfirmUpdateSubmodules (task dialog). Other domain-specific helpers join with their consumers.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormResetC.notes: Sizing follows the original: a custom message grows the dialog, clamped between its designed size and three quarters of the screen work area. The minimize box cannot be hidden separately in Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormStatus.c.notes: Plain text console only; no taskbar progress or status badge icons.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormProcess..notes: Headless end-to-end success and failure tests pass; Escape now uses the shared dialog key handler instead of a form-specific override.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/PasswordInput.notes: No drag and drop of text; eye button has no image yet.

src/app/GitUI/ConsoleEmulation/PlainText.notes: Read-only TextBox output; Linux and macOS commands start through ProcessExtensions.StartInOwnProcessGroup so cancellation reaches re-parented group members; no clickable links yet.

src/app/GitCommands/Git/Extensions/Proce.notes: Shared source retains the Windows Ctrl+C path and adds portable entire-tree termination plus Linux setsid and macOS native-launcher process-group cleanup.

src/app/GitExtensions/Program.cs.notes: Entry point twin (with App.axaml.cs); browse command and repo detection only.
